message:
fix(command,runtime,server): six correctness bugs from deep review

1. TTL truncation: use ms/1000 instead of (ms+500)/1000 to match Redis
2. BITFIELD sign-extend: fix mask to !((1<<bits)-1) for correct i8/i16/etc
3. GEOHASH last character: compute from remaining 2 bits instead of hardcoding '0'
4. ZRANGEBYSCORE LIMIT count: accept negative values (-1 = unlimited) per Redis spec
5. PUBSUB NUMPAT: sum all per-pattern subscriber counts, not just unique patterns
6. Pub/Sub memory leak: skip buffering messages for closing connections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
